image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S015. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: Protagonist A peels back a corner of the newspaper.; He reveals a pencil-written message underneath.; The message reads: 'If he comes back, don't let him remember the basement.'. narration intent: Narrator explains "报纸下面露出一段铅笔字：如果他回来，别让他记起地下室。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "他是谁？是我吗？". shot positive notes: Extreme close-up of a handwritten pencil message on a wall, partially hidden by newspaper, man's hand peeling paper, dramatic lighting, suspense, cinematic.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S015. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: Protagonist A peels back a corner of the newspaper.; He reveals a pencil-written message underneath.; The message reads: 'If he comes back, don't let him remember the basement.'. narration intent: Narrator explains "报纸下面露出一段铅笔字：如果他回来，别让他记起地下室。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "他是谁？是我吗？". shot positive notes: Extreme close-up of a handwritten pencil message on a wall, partially hidden by newspaper, man's hand peeling paper, dramatic lighting, suspense, cinematic.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, blurry, illegible, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 报纸下面露出一段铅笔字：如果他回来，别让他记起地下室。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
